product.name: SqueezeOS
product.tagline: Institutional-grade AI trading intelligence — 33 MCP tools, pay-per-signal in RLUSD
product.description: SqueezeOS is an institutional-grade AI trading intelligence platform exposed as a 33-tool MCP server. AI agents call tools directly via JSON-RPC 2.0. Premium endpoints are pay-per-call — agents pay RLUSD on the XRP Ledger via 402Proof and receive a 1-hour signed JWT. No API keys, no subscriptions.

engines.name: OracleEngine
engines.description: Aggregates all signal engines into a single directive: BUY (IGNITION), BUY, HOLD, SELL, or SHIELD.

engines.name: RecurrentDepthTransformer (RDT / OpenMythos)
engines.description: Recursive what-if multi-symbol ranking engine using fractal anchors (depth 0-3).

engines.name: MarketGraph (GraphiFY)
engines.description: Neo4j AuraDB knowledge graph — ticker nodes, Greek/dark-pool/fractal edges.

engines.name: ScriptMaster / Beastmode
engines.description: SEO/recon node: P01 Authority Signaling, P02 Visual Saturation, P03 Sentiment Exploitation.

premium_endpoints.description: Multi-engine AI verdict for any symbol
Full signal thesis from peer marketplace

product.supported_symbols: US equities — IWM SPY QQQ GME AMC MSTR NVDA TSLA PLTR HOOD + scan universe $1-$50
target_users: AI agents needing autonomous market signal access

ecosystem.description: ScriptMasterLabs builds x402 micropayment infrastructure, AI agent trust systems, and institutional market intelligence tools. All products interoperate via the x402 protocol for agent-native payments.

related_products.name: mcp-x402 Signal API
related_products.description: 43+ MCP tools covering trading signals, web scraping, SEC data, XRPL whale copy-trading, memecoin launchpad, and agent infrastructure. Multi-chain x402: Base USDC, XRPL RLUSD, Solana USDC.

related_products.name: Ghost Layer
related_products.description: Private routing engine with XRPL+Base micropayment toll, Xahau hooks intelligence, and URIToken minting.

related_products.name: Aetheris-MCP
related_products.description: SSE MCP server with JSDOM-sanitized web scraping behind an on-chain x402 USDC micropayment interceptor.

related_products.name: Aetheris Client SDK
related_products.description: Official npm SDK that auto-intercepts HTTP 402 challenges and settles USDC payments on Base.

related_products.name: CrawlToll
related_products.description: Metered web crawling with x402 micropayment gating.

related_products.name: ZeroQuery Protocol
related_products.role: Privacy-preserving intent ranking with ZK proofs
related_products.description: SDK + Anchor program for ranking user intents without leaking raw queries. Groth16 ZK proofs + SOL SaaS tiers.

related_products.name: AGO Orchestrator
related_products.description: Orchestration layer for ScriptMasterLabs autonomous agent workflows.

related_products.name: CodeAgentX
related_products.description: Dexter — 4-agent architecture for financial research. TTM Squeeze detection, MOASS scanner, institutional options flow.

related_products.name: Printing Press Library
related_products.role: Published catalog of generated Go CLIs and MCP servers
related_products.description: Registry of type-safe Go CLIs and MCP servers. Install via npx @mvanhorn/printing-press.
